articles.title: Conventions and Conferences
articles.complete_text:
CONVENTIONS AND CONFERENCES

General Board members visited Relief Society stake conventions and conferences, which were held in the stakes during 1925, as follows:

Alberta—Mrs. Louise Y. Robison.
Alpine—Mrs. Jennie B. Knight, Mrs. Annie Wells Cannon.
Banner—Mrs. Elise B. Alder.
Bear Lake—Mrs. Lotta Paul Baxter.
Bear River—Mrs. Cora L. Bennion.
Beaver—Mrs. Amy W. Evans.
Benson—Miss Sarah M. McLelland.
Big Horn—Mrs. Louise Y. Robison.
Blackfoot—Mrs. Ethel R. Smith.
Blaine—Mrs. Amy W. Evans.
Boise—Mrs. Elise B. Alder.
Box Elder—Mrs. Annie Wells Cannon, Mrs. Ethel R. Smith.
Burley—Mrs. Amy W. Evans.
Cache—Mrs. Nettie D. Bradford, Mrs. Elise B. Alder.
Cannon—Mrs. Annie Wells Cannon.
Cassia—Mrs. Louise Y. Robison.
Cottonwood—Mrs. Amy Brown Lyman, Miss Sarah M. McLelland.
Curlew—Mrs. Elise B. Alder.
Davis—Mrs. Lalene H. Hart.
Duchesne—Mrs. Louise Y. Robison.
Emery—Mrs. Jennie B. Knight.
Ensign—Mrs. Annie Wells Cannon, Mrs. Julia A. F. Lund.
Franklin—Mrs. Elise B. Alder.
Fremont—Mrs. Elise B. Alder.
Garfield—Mrs. Amy W. Evans.
Gunnison—Mrs. Jennie B. Knight.
Granite—Mrs. Clarissa S. Williams, Mrs. Julia A. F. Lund.
Grant—Mrs. Clarissa S. Williams, Mrs. Julia A. F. Lund.
Hyrum—Mrs. Ethel R. Smith.
Idaho—Mrs. Annie Wells Cannon.
Idaho Falls—Mrs. Cora L. Bennion.
Jordan—Mrs. Clarissa S. Williams, Mrs. Julia A. F. Lund.
Juab—Mrs. Lotta Paul Baxter.
Kanab—Mrs. Lotta Paul Baxter.
Kanab—Mrs. Amy W. Evans.
Knob—Mrs. Cora L. Bennion, Mrs. Nettie D. Bradford.
Lethbridge—Mrs. Louise Y. Robison.
Liberty—Mrs. Cora L. Bennion, Mrs. Julia A. F. Lund.
Logan—Mrs. Louise Y. Robison, Mrs. Ethel R. Smith.
Lost River—Mrs. Nettie D. Bradford.
Los Angeles—Mrs. Lotta Paul Baxter.
Malad—Mrs. Louise Y. Robison.
Maricopa—Mrs. Lotta Paul Baxter.
Millard—Miss Sarah M. McLelland.
Mindoka—Mrs. Amy Brown Lyman.
Montpelier—Mrs. Ethel R. Smith.
Moapa—Mrs. Lotta Paul Baxter.

Morgan—Mrs. Cora L. Bennion.
Mt. Ogden—Mrs. Louise Y. Robison.
Nebo—Mrs. Amy Brown Lyman, Mrs. Annie Wells Cannon.
North Davis—Mrs. Emma A. Empey.
Miss Sarah M. McLelland.
No. Sanpete—Mrs. Cora L. Bennion.
No. Sevier—Mrs. Elise B. Alder.
Ogden—Mrs. Lalene H. Hart, Mrs. Julia A. F. Lund.
Ogden—Mrs. Emma A. Empey, Mrs. Nettie D. Bradford.
Oneida—Mrs. Lalene H. Hart.
Oquirrh—Mrs. Amy Brown Lyman, Mrs. Elise B. Alder.
Palmyra—Mrs. Jennie B. Knight, Mrs. Nettie D. Bradford.
Panguitch—Mrs. Amy W. Evans.
Payson—Mrs. Annie Wells Cannon.
Pioneer—Mrs. Clarissa S. Williams, Mrs. Julia A. F. Lund.
Pocatello—Mrs. Louise Y. Robison.
Portneuf—Mrs. Ethel R. Smith.
Raft River—Mrs. Nettie D. Bradford.
Rigby—Mrs. Amy W. Evans.
Salt Lake—Mrs. Louise Y. Robison.
St. George—Mrs. Louise Y. Robison.
St. Johns—Mrs. Julia A. F. Lund.
St. Joseph—Mrs. Lotta Paul Baxter.
Salt Lake—Mrs. Amy Brown Lyman, Mrs. Cora L. Bennion.
San Juan—Mrs. Jennie B. Knight.

So. Sevier—Mrs. Annie Wells Cannon.
Star Valley—Mrs. Nettie D. Bradford.
